title: Launch Lullaby
description: A four-image continuity series that keeps the same hand-painted rocket, gantry, valley, and camera logic while moving from quiet preparation to liftoff.
creative_direction: This package proves countergenre through continuity rather than one-off gimmicks: a realistic orbital launch facility is restaged as a tender watercolor pastoral, preserving rocket identity and operational detail across four scenes.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Launch Lullaby
en.description: A four-image continuity series that keeps the same hand-painted rocket, gantry, valley, and camera logic while moving from quiet preparation to liftoff.

zh-CN.title: 发射摇篮曲
zh-CN.description: 四张连续系列在同一火箭、发射塔、山谷和镜头逻辑下，从静默准备推进到升空瞬间。
